.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(34, 20, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(44, 12, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(34, 20, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a2a, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a2a, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(34, 20, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(34, 20, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(34, 20, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(43, 10, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(43, 10, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(67, 13, 130) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(41, 28, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(44, 12, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(101, 182, 126, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(44, 12, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(44, 12, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
